info.name: GeminiTools API
info.description:
Gemini Chat API Proxy — OpenAI-compatible endpoints powered by Google Gemini via Electron.

**Features:**
- OpenAI-compatible `/v1/chat/completions` (non-streaming & real SSE streaming)
- SQLite conversation tracking with auto-match for Cline/Void
- Simple `/api/chat` endpoint for direct usage
- 3 conversation modes: explicit ID, auto-match from history, new

**Default:** http://localhost:9999 (configurable via PORT env var)

item.name: Health & Info
item.description: Service health, model listing, and conversation management endpoints.

request.description: Returns service status and list of available endpoints.
OpenAI-compatible model listing. Returns a single model: `gemini`.
List stored conversations from SQLite, ordered by most recently updated. Includes first user message preview.
Delete a conversation and all its messages from SQLite.

item.name: Simple Chat
item.description: Direct chat endpoint — simpler API, no OpenAI format. Returns raw Gemini conversation IDs for manual continuation.

request.description:
Start a new conversation.

**Body:**
- `message` (required): The user message
- `lang` (optional): Language code, default `vi`

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Xin chào! Tôi là...",
  "conversation_id": "...",
  "response_id": "...",
  "choice_id": "..."
}
```

Continue an existing conversation by passing IDs from previous response.

**Body:**
- `message` (required): The user message
- `conversation_id`: Gemini conversation ID from previous response
- `response_id`: Gemini response ID from previous response
- `choice_id`: Gemini choice ID from previous response
- `lang` (optional): Language code, default `vi`

item.name: OpenAI Compatible
item.description:
OpenAI-compatible `/v1/chat/completions` endpoint. Works with Cline, Void, and other OpenAI-compatible clients.

**Conversation modes:**
1. `conversation_id` provided → continue that conversation
2. No ID but messages match stored history → auto-continue (Cline/Void auto-match)
3. Completely new → start fresh conversation

**Streaming:** Set `stream: true` for real SSE streaming (tokens appear progressively via console-message channel).

request.description: Continue conversation using explicit `conversation_id`. Only the new user message is sent to Gemini.

Auto-match mode (Cline/Void style). Send full message history — if stored messages are a prefix of incoming messages, the existing Gemini conversation is automatically continued. No `conversation_id` needed.

This is how Cline and Void work: they send the entire chat history each time, and the server matches it to an existing conversation.

exec: // Streaming responses are SSE - parse last chunk for conversation_id

request.description: Continue an existing conversation with streaming enabled. Uses `conversation_id` from a previous request.

Cline sends content as an array of `{type, text}` objects. The server normalizes this to plain text automatically.

This tests that content normalization works correctly for Cline/Void integration.
